options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_type
options.description:
What criteria to goal
notes = read all notes
7Zee = buy all 7Zee ranks
credits = get credits

options.name: start_with_dry_reef
options.description: Start with the Dry Reef unlocked

options.name: enable_stylish_dlc_treasure_pods
options.description:
note: THIS WILL NOT GIVE YOU DLC
YOU MUST __***OWN***__ THE DLC

options.name: treasure_cracker_checks
options.description:
which levels of the treasure cracker is considered as checks
default: level 1
level 1 requires crafting 1 gadget
level 2 requires crafting 20 gadgets
level 3 requires crafting 50 gadgets

options.name: include_7z
options.description:
Include unlockables behind 7z as checks
estimated to appear in sphere 2 and above

options.name: plortsanity
options.description: Selling a plort for the first time will send a check

options.name: fix_market_rates
options.description:
Overrides the default market behavior:
instead of https://slimerancher.fandom.com/wiki/Plort_Market_(Slime_Rancher)
it will make all plort prices 150% base value, base value listed in the above link

options.name: start_with_drone
options.description: Start with a Drone

options.name: trap_percent
options.description: what percent of filler should be replaced with traps

options.name: include_ogden
options.description: Include Ogden's Retreat

options.name: include_mochi
options.description: Include Mochi's Manor

options.name: include_viktor
options.description: Include Viktor's Workshop

options.name: postgame
options.description: Include Post-Credit Locations, i.e. Item Vaults

options.name: easy_skips
options.description: Enable Skips that many new players end up finding on their first playthrough

options.name: precise_movement
options.description: Enable Skips that require tighter movement than average

options.name: dangerous_skips
options.description: Enable Skips that have a high chance of taking damage or getting killed

options.name: obscure_locations
options.description: Enable Skips that abuse the terrain, usually in unintuitive ways

options.name: largo_jumps
options.description: EnableSkips where you jump off a largo midair

options.name: jetpack_boosts
options.description: Enable Skips where you use the ability to get rid of jetpack's startup times through careful jumping, allowing for more energy conservation

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
